{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323180357A60BA41443509EAE8A67"}"},"total":944},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7592505247715394329","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我自从看过这种背德文学后就忘不掉了太爽了  现实我们不敢做还不能心理幻想吗哈哈哈  这本是我在开始看这种类型的文章后最喜欢的一本  毫不夸张我后面看完这个后又刷了几十篇但都没这个有意思  这本小说里的女主们每一章节都在攻略男主 但是又不是那种被男主无脑爱上的  过程很生动  并且最棒的是每一张都是1v2！这才是我们大女人该看的文啊  第一次为了一部小说评价哈哈哈  这次是我看完忘不掉找半天又找回来了 太好看了！！！！！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767769412,"group_id":"7549946174464068670","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nz+gYf+7xiFkBpnN1QzHnFaN5PX3JeD1l+C6edrqI4lT","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2069754153285059","user_name":"江南省的范德尔"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2069754153285059","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7549946174464068670","book_info":{"abstract":"【快穿万人迷＋修罗场＋黑原女主＋无固定cp】
桑雪是一个心机女，死后被女配系统绑定。
每个小世界的原女主们，褪去女主光环跟所谓的恶毒女配没有任何区别。
她们或恶毒自私，或慷他人之慨，最擅长踩着别的女人上位。
却因为头顶光环，最后过上了幸福的生活。
小世界的炮灰女配们纷纷不干了，要求平等的待遇。
桑雪被系统绑定后，目标是穿越到各个位面，以恶制恶，攻略男主。          
（1）合租闺蜜的暗恋对象是京圈太子爷
（2）姐姐，你怎么想跟我喜欢的男人在一起？
（3）豪门豪门我来了
（4）网恋吗？我很纯的
（5）农女也可以阴湿病娇吗
","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/e031fa7eb2593a2ffa905ce3689ad32b","author":"岁也","author_id":"","book_id":"7549946174464068670","book_name":"心机女配上位，你男朋友归我了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0d8d8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":24,"name":"快穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=24&name=快穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":29,"name":"总裁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=29&name=总裁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":473,"name":"豪门世家","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=473&name=豪门世家&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7550164013099778622","read_count":"66586","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"721315"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"303","tags":"快穿,现代言情,系统,总裁,豪门世家,大佬","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/5e743364a8a7b939b8126199daf6a9a3~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779444237&x-signature=0%2BHB3il1sdz2a%2FT02REao%2BaQcl4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2049114310189853","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"157"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323180357A60BA41443509EAE8A67"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读10小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":137,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":1,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":37247,"reply_count":6,"show_pv":21998},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7575767906903474968","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的很好看。第二个世界特别好看，之前看过类似的，设定跟第一个世界一样，但是男二戏份太多了。虽然很喜欢男二，但我就是冲着晋级看的。
女主心理和外表非常有反差感，所以没有虐女的感觉。男二出场有些晚，有点工具人的感觉，不过作者写的很不错，本来就没有冲男二看可以忽略不计，男二除了有点工具人写得还不错。
第一个世界没有看，前面看的感觉不适合我，进展太快了，没有那种晋级感，看完的宝子可以跟我说一下。
本来是想找代餐的，没想到发现了这么好看的，太惊喜了，能当正餐吃的惊喜感。
会继续追更的，作者大大加油[爱慕]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1763872959,"group_id":"7549946174464068670","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N82PYAb4hJppNCyPNg+/KGfuG0iljjVHadiMkYdfGKYl","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/771161bbf0fb4e6796d1e8a069e91200~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792882&x-signature=pzdKg0P6bvPNMS5Lr3XREwnhS0M%3D","user_id":"2236871503518184","user_name":"限明星"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2236871503518184","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7549946174464068670","book_info":{"abstract":"【快穿万人迷＋修罗场＋黑原女主＋无固定cp】

_book_count":0,"read_duration":6645,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":41312},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7559782393265079102","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"多更，爱看，女主好带感，聪明有心机，风格多变，很有魅力，虽然在感情道德方面不太正，但我一个女生都感觉被勾到了，女主不完全是坏女人，在剧情里是有原因的坏坏，不是下黑手整死人的那种，1v2写的也很流畅，感情进度快，男主都不咋禁撩，很快就沦陷了，不用动脑的甜文，爱了爱了！","text_exts":[{"e":64,"s":61,"text":"坏女人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%9D%8F%E5%A5%B3%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742602379EAE8A67%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227559782393265079102%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227549946174464068670%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%9D%8F%E5%A5%B3%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1760151856,"group_id":"7549946174464068670","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"宝宝们新年快乐～","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/zbr3vqQcvxIJ0e/ahMWK49A2QyKvL80ort4lJdN+YA","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/59a417c16c0b45aeaeb0c0bc3fe0d082~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795192&x-signature=EbzOGAuFIshdDTueSv8TXHMGEIA%3D","user_id":"2120330455550391","user_name":"by拜拜"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2120330455550391","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7549946174464068670","book_info":{"abstract":"【快穿万人迷＋修罗场＋黑原女主＋无固定cp】
